UIXCreateFontRenderer

Creates the default Xbox Drop-in UI font rendering plug-in.

HRESULT UIXCreateFontRenderer(
    LPCSTR pFontFileName,
    ITitleFontRenderer **ppFont
);

Parameters

pFontFileName
[in] Pointer to a null-terminated character string that specifies the file name of the file font to use for text rendering.
ppFont
[out] Address of an ITitleFontRenderer pointer that receives the font rendering plug-in interface.

Return Values

Returns S_OK if successful, an error code otherwise.

Remarks

ITitleFontRenderer implements the font rendering plug-in interface to the Xbox Drop-in UI engine. The engine calls methods on the interface to render text for the user interface. Titles can provide their own implementation or use the default ITitleFontRenderer obtained with UIXCreateFontRenderer.

To free the font renderer interface when it is no longer needed, call Release on the ITitleFontRenderer pointer.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Uix.h.

Import Library: Use Uix.lib.
